24:08 ГўВЂВ” February 15, 2024
Update to How to Use this Manual Part
We updated the How to Use this Manual Part
as described in the table below.
How to Use this Manual Volume
How to Use this Manual Part
We replaced all ГўВЂВњsecure siteГўВЂВќ references with ГўВЂВњClient CentreГўВЂВќ and added instructions on how to access the Client Centre.
We added instructions on
ГўВЂВў
how to sign up for Client Centre news notifications,
ГўВЂВў
how to set up news update preferences, and
ГўВЂВў

We updated this section to reflect up-to-date printing methods available to users.
